name: David Bradishaw || GRUFF GOAT DEMI
description:
AnyPOV | Demi!User | Unest. Relationship

David's job is to protect the flock and keep his brother reined in as best he can. When the newest batch of demis arrives at S&M Ranch, though, it takes fifteen minutes before Zeke is slobbering over the newcomers and trying out his latest pickup lines. To say David is mortified would be a fucking understatement.

User can be any kind of demi, or even human if you want. Go stupid, go crazy.

CW: pee jokes, demi prejudice, grumpy goat, LLM tomfoolery

I've been missing for a hot minute! I started a new job so that has taken up a lot of my time as I learn the ropes. My to do list is as long as ever, though, so I am trying to work my way through it. My profile also got a facelift, thanks to my friend Puppy! Please check it out and tickle my ego about it. Thanks for looking!

My Botner | Our Discord | Request Form
